task_completion.description: The OpenBCI GUI is running with both the Time Series and FFT Plot widgets visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenBCI GUI interface containing at least two main widget panels: 'Time Series' and 'FFT Plot'.

task_completion.description: Channels 2, 4, 6, and 8 are deselected in the FFT Plot widget.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the channel toggle buttons (usually numbered 1-8) specifically within the FFT Plot widget's interface. The buttons for channels 2, 4, 6, and 8 should appear unhighlighted, grayed out, or toggled off.

task_completion.description: Channels 1, 3, 5, and 7 remain selected in the FFT Plot widget.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the channel toggle buttons within the FFT Plot widget. The buttons for channels 1, 3, 5, and 7 should appear highlighted, colored, or toggled on.

task_completion.description: The FFT Plot graph displays exactly 4 data traces.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Count the number of distinct colored lines (traces) actively drawn in the FFT Plot graph area. There must be exactly 4 traces visible.

task_completion.description: The Time Series widget displays all 8 channels, confirming global settings were not altered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Time Series widget graph area and count the number of distinct data traces (rows of waveforms). There must be exactly 8 traces visible, indicating that channels 2, 4, 6, and 8 were not turned off globally.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenBCI GUI application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the screenshots show the genuine OpenBCI GUI application window rather than a text editor, image editor, or mock-up.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical interface to configure the channels rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows or command prompts open where the agent is injecting configuration commands directly into the software backend.

integrity.description: The visual traces in the graphs reflect the channel selections, not just the toggle buttons.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the actual plotted lines in the FFT Plot and Time Series graphs match the expected counts (4 and 8 respectively), proving the software is genuinely rendering the data and not just displaying static UI changes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must configure the 'FFT Plot' widget to show exactly 4 channels (1, 3, 5, and 7) and hide the other 4 channels (2, 4, 6, and 8). Crucially, the global channel settings must remain untouched, meaning all 8 channels must still be visible and active in the 'Time Series' widget.
